languages.text: "Погибнут многие. Пройдет немало времени, прежде мы сможем объявить новый Призыв".

traits.locale_text: "Погибнут многие. Пройдет немало времени, прежде мы сможем объявить новый Призыв".

languages.text: "Many will die. It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."
languages.original_text: "Погибнут многие. Пройдет немало времени, прежде мы сможем объявить новый Призыв".

traits.locale_text: "Many will die and It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."
"Even with supplies from the dynasty, many will die, Lord Captain. It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."
"Even with supplies from the dynasty, many will die, Lord Captain. It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."
"Many will die and It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."
"Many will die. It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."

languages.text: 「王朝からの補給物資でも、多くは死んでしまうでしょう、艦長。新たなコールアップを出すまでには、長い時間がかかるでしょう」
languages.original_text: "Even with supplies from the dynasty, many will die, Lord Captain. It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."

traits.locale_text: 「王朝からの補給物資でも、多くは死んでしまうでしょう、艦長。新たな召集令を出すまでには、長い時間がかかるでしょう」

languages.text: «Muchos morirán. Pasará mucho tiempo antes de que podamos anunciar un nuevo llamado».
languages.original_text: "Many will die. It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."

traits.locale_text: «Muchos morirán. Pasará mucho tiempo antes de que podamos anunciar un nuevo llamado».

languages.text: “伤亡将极其惨重。我们需要间隔很长时间才能进行下一次征召。”
languages.original_text: "Many will die. It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."

traits.locale_text: “伤亡将极其惨重。我们需要间隔很长时间才能进行下一次征召。”

languages.text: "Viele werden sterben. Es wird lange dauern, bis wir eine neue Einberufung verkünden können."
languages.original_text: "Many will die. It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."

traits.locale_text: "Viele werden sterben. Es wird lange dauern, bis wir eine neue Einberufung verkünden können."

languages.text: "Birçokları ölecek. Yeni bir Sevk Grubu başlatmamız uzun zaman alacak."
languages.original_text: "Many will die. It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."

traits.locale_text: "Birçokları ölecek. Yeni bir Sevk Grubu başlatmamız uzun zaman alacak."

languages.text: « Beaucoup périront. Nous ne pourrons pas annoncer de nouvelle Mobilisation avant un bon moment. »
languages.original_text: "Many will die. It will be a long time before we can announce a new Call-Up."

traits.locale_text: « Beaucoup périront. Nous ne pourrons pas annoncer de nouvelle Mobilisation avant un bon moment. »
